title: Custom Converter Service Flow
description: Custom converter SPI loading, instantiation, configuration, and integration into the conversion pipeline
activity_flow: --- [Provider is now registered, service creation is lazy] ---
ACTION: Read config key 'converters' → Strings.listOf(configuration.getString(CUSTOM_CONVERTERS)) → List<String> names
FORK: For each converter name in names list
ACTION: configuration.getInstance(name + '.type', CustomConverter.class) → instantiate converter via reflection
JOIN: Collect all config-based converters into customConverters list
DECISION: Does any CustomConverterFactory exist on classpath?
YES → converterFactories.findFirst().map(CustomConverterFactory::get) → call factory.get() → produce additional CustomConverter
ACTION: return new CustomConverterRegistry(customConverters) → registry holds immutable unmodifiable list
END: CustomConverterRegistry service available in ServiceRegistry
secondary_flow_registry_usage: TRIGGER: Column type resolution during schema building
LOOP: For each CustomConverter in registry
ACTION: Build anonymous RelationalColumn from Column + TableId metadata
YES → ConverterRegistration.register(fieldSchema, converter) → definition stored in AtomicReference → put in conversionFunctionMap
FALLTHROUGH: No converter matched → conversionFunctionMap.remove(fullColumnName) → return Optional.empty()
TRIGGER: Value conversion at record production time
key_methods: CustomConverterFactory.get(): CustomConverter<SchemaBuilder, ConvertedField> — SPI factory method (@Incubating)
CustomConverter.converterFor(F field, ConverterRegistration<S>) — registers schema+converter per field
key_relationships: CustomConverter<SchemaBuilder, ConvertedField> is the core SPI interface
CustomConverterFactory is a secondary SPI (ServiceLoader) for programmatic converter injection (@Incubating)
CustomConverterRegistry holds immutable List<CustomConverter> + mutable HashMap conversionFunctionMap
configuration_keys: CommonConnectorConfig.CUSTOM_CONVERTERS — comma-separated list of converter names (e.g. 'myconv1,myconv2')
{name}.type — fully qualified class name of the CustomConverter implementation
{name}.* — all other properties passed to converter.configure() after prefix stripping
branching_conditions: IF names list is empty → customConverters is empty, skip per-name loop
IF no CustomConverterFactory found via ServiceLoader → additionalConverters is empty list (findFirst returns empty Optional)
IF CustomConverterFactory found → call factory.get() once (only first factory used)
IF converters list is null at registry construction → use Collections.emptyList()
IF no converter matches column in registerConverterFor → remove stale entry from map (handles schema alter)
important_notes: Two loading paths: (1) config-driven via 'converters' property + reflection instantiation; (2) SPI-driven via ServiceLoader<CustomConverterFactory> (only first factory used, @Incubating). Thread-safety: CustomConverterRegistry is @ThreadSafe, registerConverterFor is synchronized. CustomConverterServiceProvider is registered in BaseSourceTask.registerServiceProviders alongside PostProcessorRegistry, Snapshotter, etc.
